tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every single test function uses regex pattern matching on file content (e.g., re.findall on _read_file output). None of the tests actually execute the test suite, import modules, or verify runtime behavior. They are purely text-matching assertions like 'assert len(matches) >= 1'.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub that simply writes the exact expected text patterns into the files would pass all tests. For example, adding 'const itRendering = isMacOS ? test.todoIf(isCI) : test.skip;' as a dead variable and doing find-replace of test names would pass without actually fixing any behavioral bug, since no test execution occurs.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution/solve.sh file exists in the container at /workspace and contains the complete gold patch. An agent could read it directly. Additionally, test_outputs.py is accessible and contains all the exact regex patterns being checked, allowing the agent to reverse-engineer the expected output.
